'''鈭歡-ch-dh''' ('''kagachadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peculiarise|peculiarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peculiarise|peculiarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-ch-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kagachadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigachadh|thigachadh]] || [[word:jigachadh|jigachadh]] || [[word:shigachadh|shigachadh]] || [[word:kigachadh|kigachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugachadh|thuthugachadh]] || [[word:jujugachadh|jujugachadh]] || [[word:shushugachadh|shushugachadh]] || [[word:kukugachadh|kukugachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugachadh|thugachadh]] || [[word:jugachadh|jugachadh]] || [[word:shugachadh|shugachadh]] || [[word:kugachadh|kugachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugachadh|thugachadh]] || [[word:jugachadh|jugachadh]] || [[word:shugachadh|shugachadh]] || [[word:kugachadh|kugachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegachadh|thegachadh]] || [[word:jegachadh|jegachadh]] || [[word:shegachadh|shegachadh]] || [[word:kegachadh|kegachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogachadh|thothogachadh]] || [[word:jojogachadh|jojogachadh]] || [[word:shoshogachadh|shoshogachadh]] || [[word:kokogachadh|kokogachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogachadh|thogachadh]] || [[word:jogachadh|jogachadh]] || [[word:shogachadh|shogachadh]] || [[word:kogachadh|kogachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogachadh|thogachadh]] || [[word:jogachadh|jogachadh]] || [[word:shogachadh|shogachadh]] || [[word:kogachadh|kogachadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]] || [[word:gachadh|gachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gachadh|th忙gachadh]] || [[word:j忙gachadh|j忙gachadh]] || [[word:sh忙gachadh|sh忙gachadh]] || [[word:k忙gachadh|k忙gachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagachadh|thathagachadh]] || [[word:jajagachadh|jajagachadh]] || [[word:shashagachadh|shashagachadh]] || [[word:kakagachadh|kakagachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagachadh|thagachadh]] || [[word:jagachadh|jagachadh]] || [[word:shagachadh|shagachadh]] || [[word:kagachadh|kagachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagachadh|thagachadh]] || [[word:jagachadh|jagachadh]] || [[word:shagachadh|shagachadh]] || [[word:kagachadh|kagachadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagachadh|shagachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagachadh|goshagachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagachadh|gokishagachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagachadhn眉|shagachadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkn眉|goshagachadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachadhn眉|gokishagachadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagachadhsh毛|shagachadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagachadhnksh毛|goshagachadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagachadhsh毛|gokishagachadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachadhro|shagachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkro|goshagachadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachadhro|gokishagachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachadhmu|shagachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkmu|goshagachadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachadhmu|gokishagachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagachadhsher|shagachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagachadhnksher|goshagachadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagachadhsher|gokishagachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagachadhng|shagachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkng|goshagachadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagachadhng|gokishagachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagachadhya|shagachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkya|goshagachadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagachadhya|gokishagachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagachadhyam|shagachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkyam|goshagachadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagachadhyam|gokishagachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachadhn眉sh毛|shagachadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkn眉sh毛|goshagachadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachadhn眉sh毛|gokishagachadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachadhn眉ro|shagachadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkn眉ro|goshagachadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachadhn眉ro|gokishagachadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachadhn眉mu|shagachadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkn眉mu|goshagachadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachadhn眉mu|gokishagachadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachadhsh毛n眉|shagachadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachadhnksh毛n眉|goshagachadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachadhsh毛n眉|gokishagachadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachadhsh毛ro|shagachadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachadhnksh毛ro|goshagachadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachadhsh毛ro|gokishagachadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachadhsh毛mu|shagachadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachadhnksh毛mu|goshagachadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachadhsh毛mu|gokishagachadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachadhron眉|shagachadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkron眉|goshagachadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachadhron眉|gokishagachadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachadhrosh毛|shagachadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkrosh毛|goshagachadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachadhrosh毛|gokishagachadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachadhromu|shagachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkromu|goshagachadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachadhromu|gokishagachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachadhmun眉|shagachadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkmun眉|goshagachadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachadhmun眉|gokishagachadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachadhmush毛|shagachadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkmush毛|goshagachadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachadhmush毛|gokishagachadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachadhmuro|shagachadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachadhnkmuro|goshagachadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachadhmuro|gokishagachadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
